description_long: This is an adult male figure standing upright with arms extended horizontally in a T-pose. He is dressed in a fitted, long-sleeve shirt and matching pants, both of which appear to be casual and modern in style. The figure wears sneakers with a distinct sole and laces, and his hair is styled short and voluminous, swept back from the forehead. The facial features are defined, with glasses visible on the face, adding a touch of personality. The overall build is average, and the clothing fits closely to the body, suggesting a casual yet put-together appearance. No accessories or carried objects are visible, and the figure's posture is neutral and balanced.
description: An adult male in a T-pose, wearing casual fitted clothing, sneakers, and glasses, with short, styled hair. The figure stands upright with arms outstretched and no visible accessories.
description_view_0: Front view shows the face, glasses, full chest, and the outstretched arms with fingers extended.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the profile of the face, the side of the glasses, and the straight alignment of the body and legs.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the back of the head, shoulders, and the back of the clothing, with arms extended.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the profile, side of the glasses, and the straight posture.
attribute_clothing_type: casual long-sleeve shirt and pants with fitted tailoring
attribute_posture: standing upright with arms extended horizontally
